title: Finish the claim: fill in the side and the reason

title: Repair the weak warrant
evidence: intro 'Revise this provided draft'; setapart embeds weak draft (Volcanic ash is harmful because it is bad for people) to fix

title: Revise a provided draft on your own

title: Revise a provided draft on a NEW topic
evidence: setapart 'Provided draft to fix' (The water cycle is important because it matters a lot); revise it, new topic

title: Fix the transitions using the frame
evidence: intro 'Revise this paragraph so each transition names the real relationship'; whole paragraph provided (ideas fixed) with transition blanks. Frame-with-blanks scaffolds revision of a provided draft; same construct as this lesson's other two revise slots

title: Revise a provided paragraph on your own
